targets.rawSql: SELECT count() FROM chargesquare.charging_events WHERE event_type = 'session_stop' AND $__timeFilter(timestamp)
SELECT round(sum(revenue_eur), 2) FROM chargesquare.charging_events WHERE event_type = 'session_stop' AND $__timeFilter(timestamp)
SELECT round(sum(energy_kwh), 1) FROM chargesquare.charging_events WHERE event_type = 'session_stop' AND $__timeFilter(timestamp)
SELECT round(countIf(event_type = 'fault_alert') * 100.0 / count(), 3) FROM chargesquare.charging_events WHERE $__timeFilter(timestamp)

SELECT concat(toString(toHour(hour)), ':00') AS "Peak Hour", round(sum(total_energy_kwh), 1) AS "Energy (kWh)" FROM chargesquare.sessions_hourly_mv WHERE $__timeFilter(hour) GROUP BY hour ORDER BY sum(total_energy_kwh) DESC LIMIT 1

SELECT concat(toString(toHour(hour)), ':00') AS "Lowest Hour", round(sum(total_energy_kwh), 1) AS "Energy (kWh)" FROM chargesquare.sessions_hourly_mv WHERE $__timeFilter(hour) GROUP BY hour ORDER BY sum(total_energy_kwh) ASC LIMIT 1
SELECT hour AS time, round(sum(total_energy_kwh), 1) AS energy_kwh FROM chargesquare.sessions_hourly_mv WHERE $__timeFilter(hour) GROUP BY hour ORDER BY hour
SELECT hour AS time, sum(session_count) AS sessions FROM chargesquare.sessions_hourly_mv WHERE $__timeFilter(hour) GROUP BY hour ORDER BY hour
SELECT hour AS time, round(sum(total_revenue_eur), 2) AS revenue_eur FROM chargesquare.sessions_hourly_mv WHERE $__timeFilter(hour) GROUP BY hour ORDER BY hour

panels.title: Energy Heatmap — Hour of Day × Day of Week

targets.rawSql: SELECT toHour(hour) AS Hour, round(sumIf(total_energy_kwh, toDayOfWeek(hour)=1),0) AS Mon, round(sumIf(total_energy_kwh, toDayOfWeek(hour)=2),0) AS Tue, round(sumIf(total_energy_kwh, toDayOfWeek(hour)=3),0) AS Wed, round(sumIf(total_energy_kwh, toDayOfWeek(hour)=4),0) AS Thu, round(sumIf(total_energy_kwh, toDayOfWeek(hour)=5),0) AS Fri, round(sumIf(total_energy_kwh, toDayOfWeek(hour)=6),0) AS Sat, round(sumIf(total_energy_kwh, toDayOfWeek(hour)=7),0) AS Sun FROM chargesquare.sessions_hourly_mv WHERE $__timeFilter(hour) GROUP BY Hour ORDER BY Hour

SELECT count(DISTINCT station_id) FROM (SELECT station_id, 100.0 * countIf(event_type = 'fault_alert') / count() AS fr FROM chargesquare.charging_events WHERE $__timeFilter(timestamp) GROUP BY station_id HAVING fr > 0.5)

SELECT station_id AS Station, network_id AS Network, city AS City, countIf(event_type = 'session_start') AS Sessions, countIf(event_type = 'fault_alert') AS Faults, round(100.0 * countIf(event_type = 'fault_alert') / count(), 3) AS "Fault Rate (%)", round(100.0 * countIf(event_type = 'session_start') / nullIf(countIf(event_type = 'session_start') + countIf(event_type = 'fault_alert'), 0), 1) AS "Uptime (%)" FROM chargesquare.charging_events WHERE $__timeFilter(timestamp) GROUP BY station_id, network_id, city HAVING Faults > 0 ORDER BY "Fault Rate (%)" DESC LIMIT 20

SELECT network_id AS Network, round(100.0 * countIf(event_type = 'session_start') / nullIf(countIf(event_type = 'session_start') + countIf(event_type = 'fault_alert'), 0), 1) AS "Uptime (%)" FROM chargesquare.charging_events WHERE $__timeFilter(timestamp) GROUP BY network_id ORDER BY "Uptime (%)" DESC

panels.title: A3 — Avg Charging Duration & Energy by Vehicle Brand

targets.rawSql: SELECT if(vehicle_brand = 'Tesla', 'Tesla', 'Other Brands') AS Brand, count() AS Sessions, round(avg(duration_minutes), 1) AS "Avg Duration (min)", round(avg(energy_kwh), 2) AS "Avg kWh", round(avg(energy_kwh / nullIf(duration_minutes / 60.0, 0)), 1) AS "Avg Power (kW)", round(sum(energy_kwh), 1) AS "Total kWh", round(avg(revenue_eur), 2) AS "Avg Revenue (€)" FROM chargesquare.charging_events WHERE event_type = 'session_stop' AND vehicle_brand != '' AND duration_minutes > 0 AND $__timeFilter(timestamp) GROUP BY Brand ORDER BY Brand ASC

SELECT if(vehicle_brand = 'Tesla', 'Tesla', 'Other Brands') AS Brand, round(avg(duration_minutes), 1) AS "Avg Duration (min)", round(avg(energy_kwh), 2) AS "Avg kWh", round(avg(revenue_eur), 2) AS "Avg Revenue (€)" FROM chargesquare.charging_events WHERE event_type = 'session_stop' AND vehicle_brand != '' AND duration_minutes > 0 AND $__timeFilter(timestamp) GROUP BY Brand ORDER BY Brand ASC

SELECT vehicle_brand AS Brand, count() AS Sessions, round(avg(duration_minutes), 1) AS "Avg Duration (min)", round(avg(energy_kwh), 2) AS "Avg kWh", round(avg(energy_kwh / nullIf(duration_minutes / 60.0, 0)), 1) AS "Avg Power (kW)", round(avg(revenue_eur), 2) AS "Avg Revenue (€)" FROM chargesquare.charging_events WHERE event_type = 'session_stop' AND vehicle_brand != '' AND duration_minutes > 0 AND $__timeFilter(timestamp) GROUP BY Brand ORDER BY Sessions DESC LIMIT 5

panels.title: A4 — Revenue Analysis: Tariff × Energy × Time

targets.rawSql: SELECT round(100.0 * sumIf(revenue_eur, toHour(timestamp) IN (7,8,12,13,17,18,19)) / sum(revenue_eur), 1) FROM chargesquare.charging_events WHERE event_type = 'session_stop' AND $__timeFilter(timestamp)

SELECT multiIf(toHour(hour) >= 7 AND toHour(hour) < 9, 'Morning Peak (07-09)', toHour(hour) >= 12 AND toHour(hour) < 14, 'Lunch Peak (12-14)', toHour(hour) >= 17 AND toHour(hour) < 20, 'Evening Peak (17-20)', 'Off-Peak') AS Period, sum(session_count) AS Sessions, round(sum(total_revenue_eur), 2) AS "Revenue (€)", round(sum(total_energy_kwh), 1) AS "Energy (kWh)", round(sum(total_revenue_eur) / nullIf(sum(session_count), 0), 2) AS "Rev/Session (€)" FROM chargesquare.sessions_hourly_mv WHERE $__timeFilter(hour) GROUP BY Period ORDER BY "Revenue (€)" DESC

WITH periods AS (SELECT 'Morning Peak (07-09)' AS period, 1 AS s UNION ALL SELECT 'Lunch Peak (12-14)', 2 UNION ALL SELECT 'Evening Peak (17-20)', 3 UNION ALL SELECT 'Off-Peak', 4), actuals AS (SELECT multiIf(toHour(timestamp) IN (7,8), 'Morning Peak (07-09)', toHour(timestamp) IN (12,13), 'Lunch Peak (12-14)', toHour(timestamp) IN (17,18,19), 'Evening Peak (17-20)', 'Off-Peak') AS period, count() AS sessions, round(sum(revenue_eur), 2) AS revenue FROM chargesquare.charging_events WHERE event_type = 'session_stop' AND $__timeFilter(timestamp) GROUP BY period) SELECT p.period AS Period, coalesce(a.sessions, 0) AS Sessions, coalesce(a.revenue, 0) AS "Revenue (€)" FROM periods p LEFT JOIN actuals a ON p.period = a.period ORDER BY p.s

panels.title: A5 — Geographic Distribution of FAULT Events

targets.rawSql: SELECT city AS City, count() AS Faults FROM chargesquare.charging_events WHERE event_type = 'fault_alert' AND $__timeFilter(timestamp) GROUP BY city ORDER BY Faults DESC LIMIT 1

SELECT city AS City, count() AS Faults, round(count() * 100.0 / sum(count()) OVER (), 2) AS "% of All Faults" FROM chargesquare.charging_events WHERE event_type = 'fault_alert' AND $__timeFilter(timestamp) GROUP BY city ORDER BY Faults DESC LIMIT 15

SELECT network_id AS Network, city AS City, count() AS Faults, count(DISTINCT station_id) AS Stations, round(count() / nullIf(count(DISTINCT station_id), 0), 1) AS "Faults/Station" FROM chargesquare.charging_events WHERE event_type = 'fault_alert' AND $__timeFilter(timestamp) GROUP BY network_id, city ORDER BY Faults DESC LIMIT 20

SELECT countIf(abs(p - avg_p) > 2 * std_p) FROM (SELECT round(energy_kwh/nullIf(duration_minutes/60.0,0),2) AS p, avg(round(energy_kwh/nullIf(duration_minutes/60.0,0),2)) OVER () AS avg_p, stddevPop(round(energy_kwh/nullIf(duration_minutes/60.0,0),2)) OVER () AS std_p FROM chargesquare.charging_events WHERE event_type='session_stop' AND duration_minutes>0 AND $__timeFilter(timestamp))

SELECT round(100.0 * countIf(abs(p - avg_p) > 2 * std_p) / count(), 2) FROM (SELECT round(energy_kwh/nullIf(duration_minutes/60.0,0),2) AS p, avg(round(energy_kwh/nullIf(duration_minutes/60.0,0),2)) OVER () AS avg_p, stddevPop(round(energy_kwh/nullIf(duration_minutes/60.0,0),2)) OVER () AS std_p FROM chargesquare.charging_events WHERE event_type='session_stop' AND duration_minutes>0 AND $__timeFilter(timestamp))

WITH s AS (SELECT round(energy_kwh / nullIf(duration_minutes/60.0,0),2) AS p FROM chargesquare.charging_events WHERE event_type='session_stop' AND duration_minutes>0 AND $__timeFilter(timestamp)), st AS (SELECT avg(p) AS m, stddevPop(p) AS sd FROM s), sc AS (SELECT round(abs(p-m)/nullIf(sd,0),2) AS z FROM s CROSS JOIN st) SELECT multiIf(z<1,'Normal (<1σ)',z<2,'Mild (1-2σ)',z<3,'Moderate (2-3σ)',z<4,'High (3-4σ)','Extreme (>4σ)') AS Bucket, count() AS Sessions, round(100.0*count()/sum(count()) OVER (),1) AS "% of Total" FROM sc GROUP BY Bucket ORDER BY min(z)

WITH s AS (SELECT round(energy_kwh/nullIf(duration_minutes/60.0,0),2) AS p FROM chargesquare.charging_events WHERE event_type='session_stop' AND duration_minutes>0 AND $__timeFilter(timestamp)), st AS (SELECT avg(p) AS m, stddevPop(p) AS sd FROM s), sc AS (SELECT (p-m)/nullIf(sd,0) AS z FROM s CROSS JOIN st WHERE abs((p-m)/nullIf(sd,0))<=4) SELECT multiIf(z<-3,'1: < -3σ',z<-2,'2: -3σ to -2σ',z<-1,'3: -2σ to -1σ',z<0,'4: -1σ to 0',z<1,'5: 0 to +1σ',z<2,'6: +1σ to +2σ',z<3,'7: +2σ to +3σ','8: > +3σ') AS "σ Zone", count() AS Sessions FROM sc GROUP BY "σ Zone" ORDER BY "σ Zone"

WITH sessions AS (SELECT session_id, station_id, network_id, city, vehicle_brand, energy_kwh, duration_minutes, revenue_eur, round(energy_kwh / nullIf(duration_minutes / 60.0, 0), 2) AS avg_power_kw FROM chargesquare.charging_events WHERE event_type = 'session_stop' AND duration_minutes > 0 AND $__timeFilter(timestamp)), stats AS (SELECT avg(avg_power_kw) AS mean_power, stddevPop(avg_power_kw) AS std_power FROM sessions) SELECT s.session_id AS "Session ID", s.station_id AS Station, s.city AS City, s.vehicle_brand AS Brand, s.avg_power_kw AS "Power (kW)", round(s.energy_kwh, 2) AS "Energy (kWh)", s.duration_minutes AS "Duration (min)", round(s.revenue_eur, 2) AS "Revenue (€)", round(stats.mean_power, 2) AS "Fleet Avg (kW)", round((s.avg_power_kw - stats.mean_power) / nullIf(stats.std_power, 0), 2) AS "Z-Score" FROM sessions s CROSS JOIN stats WHERE abs(s.avg_power_kw - stats.mean_power) > 2 * stats.std_power ORDER BY abs("Z-Score") DESC LIMIT 20

SELECT network_id AS Network, sum(session_count) AS Sessions, round(sum(total_revenue_eur), 2) AS "Revenue (€)", round(sum(total_energy_kwh), 1) AS "Energy (kWh)", round(sum(total_duration_minutes) / nullIf(sum(session_count), 0), 1) AS "Avg Duration (min)" FROM chargesquare.sessions_hourly_mv WHERE $__timeFilter(hour) GROUP BY network_id ORDER BY "Revenue (€)" DESC

SELECT tariff_id AS Tariff, count() AS Sessions, round(avg(revenue_eur), 2) AS "Avg Revenue (€)", round(avg(energy_kwh), 1) AS "Avg kWh", round(sum(revenue_eur) / nullIf(sum(energy_kwh), 0), 3) AS "€/kWh" FROM chargesquare.charging_events WHERE event_type = 'session_stop' AND $__timeFilter(timestamp) GROUP BY tariff_id ORDER BY "Avg Revenue (€)" DESC LIMIT 15

SELECT charger_type AS "Charger Type", count() AS Sessions, round(avg(energy_kwh / nullIf(duration_minutes / 60.0, 0)), 1) AS "Avg Power (kW)", round(avg(energy_kwh), 1) AS "Avg kWh", round(avg(revenue_eur), 2) AS "Avg Revenue (€)" FROM chargesquare.charging_events WHERE event_type = 'session_stop' AND duration_minutes > 0 AND $__timeFilter(timestamp) GROUP BY charger_type ORDER BY "Avg Power (kW)" DESC

SELECT error_code AS "Error Code", count() AS Occurrences, round(count() * 100.0 / sum(count()) OVER (), 1) AS "% of Faults" FROM chargesquare.charging_events WHERE event_type = 'fault_alert' AND $__timeFilter(timestamp) GROUP BY error_code ORDER BY Occurrences DESC LIMIT 10

SELECT city AS City, country AS Country, sum(session_count) AS Sessions, round(sum(total_energy_kwh), 1) AS "Energy (kWh)", round(sum(total_revenue_eur), 2) AS "Revenue (€)" FROM chargesquare.sessions_hourly_mv WHERE $__timeFilter(hour) GROUP BY city, country ORDER BY "Energy (kWh)" DESC LIMIT 15

SELECT vehicle_brand AS Brand, count() AS Sessions, round(avg(duration_minutes), 1) AS "Avg Duration (min)", round(avg(energy_kwh), 1) AS "Avg kWh", round(avg(revenue_eur), 2) AS "Avg Revenue (€)", round(sum(energy_kwh), 1) AS "Total kWh" FROM chargesquare.charging_events WHERE event_type = 'session_stop' AND $__timeFilter(timestamp) GROUP BY vehicle_brand ORDER BY Sessions DESC LIMIT 15
